description: Delay Updates is a ProtoFlux node that will send an impulse out of Next (Continuation) after Updates (int) updates after * (ASync Call) is impulsed.

fields.Updates: How many updates to delay for.
fields.Next: Fires after Updates (int) updates has passed after an impulse has been sent to * (ASync Call).
fields.OnTriggered: fires immediately after * (ASync Call) is called.
